title: Universal Prompt Runner Contract
description: Defines the input and output schema for the Universal Prompt Runner. Supports any domain via the plugin system.

naturalLanguageInput.description: Natural language prompt from user — any domain
examples: Design a residential building for a 1000 sqft plot in Mumbai.
Review the employment contract for compliance under Indian law.
Calculate the ROI for a 50 lakh investment over 5 years.
Create a patient assessment report for a diabetic patient.
Design the database architecture for a scalable e-commerce platform.

structuredInput.description: Pre-structured request with optional domain, intent, topic, and data

domain.description: Optional explicit domain (architecture, legal, finance, healthcare, software, general)

intent.description: Optional explicit intent within the domain

topic.description: Optional explicit topic — used as data.topic in the instruction

prompt.description: Optional natural language prompt for domain/intent detection

instruction.description: Deterministic JSON instruction output — consistent across all domains

module.description: The system module responsible for execution

topic.description: The main subject extracted from the request

tasks.description: Ordered list of task components the module must execute

output_format.description: Expected result format (e.g. step_by_step_guide, analysis_report, design_document)

routing_model.description: Hierarchical routing: Domain → Intent → Module → Task. All domains defined in domain_registry.json, all modules in module_registry.json.
routing_model.extensibility: Add a new domain by dropping plugins/<domain>/plugin.json — no core changes required.
